title: NLP-025-describe-nltk-workflow-in-python.
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-025 Describe NLTK workflow in Python.

 25. Describe NLTK workflow in Python.
答案要点:
典型流程:
python
import nltk
from nltk.tokenize import word_tokenize
from nltk.corpus import stopwords
from nltk.stem import WordNetLemmatizer

text = "NLP is fascinating"
tokens = word_tokenize(text.lower())
filtered = [w for w in tokens if w not in stopwords.words('english')]
lemmatized = [WordNetLemmatizer().lemmatize(w) for w in filtered]


质量评分: 90/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐

sections.title: 25. Describe NLTK workflow in Python.
sections.content:
**答案要点:**
**典型流程:**
```python
import nltk
from nltk.tokenize import word_tokenize
from nltk.corpus import stopwords
from nltk.stem import WordNetLemmatizer

text = "NLP is fascinating"
tokens = word_tokenize(text.lower())
filtered = [w for w in tokens if w not in stopwords.words('english')]
lemmatized = [WordNetLemmatizer().lemmatize(w) for w in filtered]
```

**质量评分**: 90/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐
